stemHtml:
You are operating a light aircraft for humanitarian operations. Today, you will transport food parcels of 10 kg each, stored in the cargo bay with a CG of 7.8 m aft of the datum line. Before loading the cargo, the total mass of the aircraft is 3 645 kg and its CG is 5.62 m aft of the datum line.

To be within the aft CG limit of 5.7 m, what is the maximum number of food parcels you can load today?
